input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.7.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.7.1
            TITLE: the vehicle must have a standalone nonprogrammable circuit to check for simultaneous

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.7.1: The vehicle must have a standalone nonprogrammable circuit to check for simultaneous
EV.7.7.1 The vehicle must have a standalone nonprogrammable circuit to check for simultaneous 
braking and high power output 
The BSPD must be provided in addition to the APPS / Brake Pedal Plausibility Check (EV.4.7)

final_answer: The vehicle must have a standalone nonprogrammable circuit to check for simultaneous braking and high power output The BSPD must be provided in addition to the APPS / Brake Pedal Plausibility Check (EV.4.7)
